arts.ttl: Team News: Nottingham Forest vs. Brentford injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Premier League clash between Nottingham Forest and Brentford.

After Sunday's FA Cup semi-final defeat to Manchester City at Wembley, Nottingham Forest have now lost three of their last four matches. Nuno's side have slipped to sixth place in the Premier League ...
